title: Sourcemeta One Schema Trace RPC Input
description: Trace step-by-step evaluation of a JSON instance against a schema in the catalog, exposing each step, rule application, and decision point

schema.description: Absolute URI of a JSON Schema in this catalog
schema.$comment: TODO: Use Format Assertion when supported on Blaze

stringifiedInstance.$comment: Accepting the instance as a JSON-encoded string is a workaround for MCP clients that stringify non-string tool arguments before sending them. See https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/24599 and https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/issues/1112
stringifiedInstance.description: The JSON value to trace evaluation against, encoded as a string of valid JSON. The server parses this string before tracing, so non-string MCP clients can still send objects, numbers, booleans, null, or arrays without losing the JSON type. The reported `instancePositions` are line/column offsets within the parsed JSON content, not within the surrounding JSON-RPC envelope
